roa.docketEntryComment: BIFUR PRELIM HRG, FR #10
BIFUR PRELIM HRG, FR #10

MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS CONSTL RTS/DEPORT CLAUSE;CRT MKES FNDGSDEFT PLD NO CONTEST CT1-245(A)(1)PC/F;CRT ENT FNDG OF G;CRT ACCEPTS PLEADA MO DISM REM CT/STRK ANY/ALL ALLEGS GRTD;REF APD/PSRCONT 12/16/94 9AM S24 FOR SENT;DEFT WVS TIME FOR PASSING OF SENT

CONT 10/25/94 AT 9AM IN S24 FOR PTC
CONT TO 10/25/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
/THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,//TR:941024/0930/S22
SEE MINS OF 7/25/94 IN D22
2PM-DEFT CONT GTW;CONT 8/25/94 1030AM PTC,9/6/94 FOR TRL 930AM IN D22
CONT TO 7/26/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22

2PM:CONT TO 7/25/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22

CONT TO 7/19/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
DEEMED PRETRIED
CONT 6/29/94 AT 9AM IN S26 FOR PTC
TRANSF TO S26 FOR PTC ON 6/22/94 AT 9AM
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAW/DEFT ARR/TN1/GTW//PC:940616/1030/S22/TR:940718/0930/S22
HTA, BAIL SET AT ORCT
